description: This updated closet essential tops our wish-list this season! Perfect for the LBD or to dress up an office ensemble, this is the go-to choice. Stylish yet not over-the-top, this modestly heeled sandal is perfect to make the right board room impression. heels: 3.5"UpperSynthetic upper with satin fabric overlayA heel cup for cushioned comfortLightly padded footbedCriss crossing straps across the ankleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
